text: Jarvis, quick check-in. What's on the calendar today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Wednesday, February 05. You have a 1:1 with Anika at 2 PM, and Ethan has piano with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Screen time is always a negotiation. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. He wants to build a clay model of Saturn for his science project. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: School projects are fun. We have clay and foam rings in the garage storage shelves that will be perfect. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that we need to address some engineering concerns with the team. The database query on the patient onboarding schema is running very slow. This could be a blocker for the Vertex Health launch.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Understood. I recommend analyzing the query execution plan to see if a compound index can speed up patient onboarding. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Reviewing my sleep tracker logs. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: Interesting. That's good medical feedback. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Jarvis, Planning for future education costs. Sarah and I are looking to maximize our savings rate. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Refinancing is a great leverage point. Smart move. I've summarized recent expenses so you can find cuts. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /user/verify under load. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: I can help with that. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /user/verify. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Screen time is always a negotiation. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Sarah attended the parent-teacher conference today. We need to sign his permission slip for the field trip to the science museum. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: Interesting. I can help with that. I've added the deadline and details to the calendar so we don't forget. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick log: We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! Got it, Mike. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Managing some allergy issues today. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. Great consistency with running. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: Looking over our mortgage options. First United Mortgage offered 5.75% with zero points. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Sure thing! Smart financial planning. A rate of 5.75% is a big drop from 6.5%. I'll calculate your savings. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: Prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. Greg Holloway wants to drop patient onboarding to save time, but Anika thinks it is essential. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Let's break this down. I suggest a phased rollout. Shipping a basic version of patient onboarding now and iterating later is a good compromise. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Lots of communication with Greg and Anika today. CareConnect prep is moving along. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
